title: I Tested OpenAI's AgentKit Against n8n: What You Need to Know

extracted.hook: OpenAI just killed Naden. Or did they really? Because they just dropped their agent kit.

accelerates: discussing the ease of use between Agent Kit and Naden
slows: explaining the differences in model support between the two platforms

extracted.vulnerability: "I don't think it's going to at all"
extracted.cta: "If you enjoyed you learned something new, please give it a like. It definitely helps me out a ton."
signature_phrases: "you guys already know what Naden is"
transitions: So, to start off with a quick overview of each of these tools
